action_density: (4*K**2*F(theta)**2*c(r)**2 - 4*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) - 8*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*c(r)**2*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2))**2 - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*y(r)**2*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))**2 + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**4*Derivative(c(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r)**2 - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r)**2 - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*y(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*y(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))**2 + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r)**2 - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(c(r), r) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*y(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)**2 + 12*b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)**2 - 24*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r) + 12*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2)/(3*F(theta)*b(r)**3*c(r))
angular_reduction_rule: integrate each Euler and endpoint density over the selected theta domain; no general division by F is valid because F and F_prime_squared/F weights coexist

compute.method: exact SymPy two-coordinate Weyl-squared action and second-order radial variations

b(r).delta_field: 2*(-6*K*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r) + 4*K*F(theta)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)**2*Derivative(y(r), (r, 3)) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 3)) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*Derivative(c(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 3)) - F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 8*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(c(r), r) - F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)**2 + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r) - 12*b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(c(r), r) + 12*c(r)**2*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(b(r), r))*y(r)/(3*F(theta)*b(r)**3*c(r))
b(r).delta_field_prime: 2*(2*K*c(r) - b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 2*b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*b(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r))*F(theta)*y(r)/(3*b(r)**2)

c(r).delta_field: -2*(2*K*F(theta)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r) - F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)**2*Derivative(y(r), (r, 3)) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 3)) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 8*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - F(theta)**2*b(r)**3*Derivative(c(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 3)) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(c(r), r) + F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)**2 + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + 2*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) - 4*F(theta)**2*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r) - 12*b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(c(r), r) + 12*c(r)**2*Derivative(F(theta), theta)**2*Derivative(b(r), r))*y(r)/(3*F(theta)*b(r)**2*c(r)**2)
c(r).delta_field_prime: -2*(-2*K*c(r) + b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) - 4*b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) - b(r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) - b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*b(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r))*F(theta)*y(r)/(3*b(r)*c(r))

y(r).delta_field: 2*(4*K*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r) - b(r)**2*c(r)**2*Derivative(y(r), (r, 3)) + b(r)**2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 3)) - b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 2*b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) + b(r)*c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 3)) - b(r)*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + 2*b(r)*c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2))*Derivative(y(r), r) + 2*b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*b(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r)**2 + c(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + c(r)**2*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r))*F(theta)/(3*b(r)*c(r))
y(r).delta_field_prime: -2*(2*K*c(r) - b(r)**2*c(r)*Derivative(y(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)**2*y(r)*Derivative(c(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)**2*Derivative(c(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) + b(r)*c(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), (r, 2)) + b(r)*c(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(y(r), r) - 2*b(r)*y(r)*Derivative(b(r), r)*Derivative(c(r), r))*F(theta)/(3*b(r))
